portrait.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG NPC portrait, bust shot of Kalen — innkeeper, rest and save point. stocky build, ruddy cheeks, brown beard, balding. Wearing simple innkeeper vest and rolled sleeves, beer mug motif apron. Holding/carrying beer mug, inn keys. Special details: always rosy-cheeked, hearty laugh lines. Expression: warm and friendly. Set in Erebos region with ruins, fog, spectral atmosphere. 256x256 pixel art style, dark gradient background, game dialogue portrait. Art style: pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
